<!-- indicator: fig-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate
#| fig-cap: 'Falls Hospitalization, Rate per 10,000 Population 65 Years and Older by Race and Ethnicity, 2020–2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Falls Hospitalization, Rate per 10,000 Population 65 Years and Older by Race and Ethnicity, 2020–2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
